{{Quote|Jonsey, pull the memory mods from from the transmitter.|[[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] [[Hong]]|audio=JonseyMemoryMods-DFSftE.flac|<ref name="DF audio drama">[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
'''Jonsey''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="DF" />

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned to the stormtrooper contingent aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']]. He was a member of the [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] that had been assigned to [[Cadet Leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]] for Katarn's [[Omega Exercise]]. He participated in the [[Battle of AX-456|ensuing battle]] on [[AX-456]] and when the platoon made it to the comm room, [[Hong]] ordered him to pull the [[memory module]]s from the transmitters before leaving the base. Jonsey and the others retreated to the base's cafeteria, where Rebel reinforcements killed all but six stormtroopers.<ref name="DF" />
